title: Can't play downloaded songs offline
text: I've downloaded several albums for a flight but when I go offline, Spotify says 'no internet connection' and won't play anything. The downloads show as available but won't play. This happens on both WiFi and mobile data before going offline.
author: Alex Rivera

title: Family plan member limit is confusing
text: The family plan says up to 6 members but I can only add 5. When I try to add a 6th person it says 'plan is full'. But the plan description clearly says 6 accounts. Is this a bug or am I misunderstanding something?
author: Jordan Chen

title: App crashes every time I open a playlist with many songs
text: Any playlist over 500 songs causes the app to crash on Android. I have to wait for it to fully load before scrolling or it just freezes and closes. My phone has 8GB RAM so it shouldn't be a device issue.
author: Sam Williams

title: Can't remove songs from my library without unfollowing the artist
text: When I remove a song from my library, it also unfollows the artist. I want to keep following artists but just remove specific songs from my collection. This makes library management impossible.
author: Taylor Martinez

title: Shuffle doesn't actually shuffle
text: I have a playlist with 200 songs and shuffle always plays the same 30 songs in roughly the same order. It's like shuffle is weighted towards songs I've listened to more. True random would be much better.
author: Casey Brooks

title: Spotify HiFi still not available after years of promises
text: Spotify announced HiFi tier years ago and it still hasn't launched. Meanwhile Apple Music and Amazon Music both offer lossless audio at no extra cost. At least give premium users better quality for what we're paying.
author: Morgan Lee

title: The queue resets when I switch devices
text: I'm building a queue on my phone and when I switch to my desktop app, the entire queue is gone. Spotify Connect should sync the queue across devices, not just the current song.
author: Riley Thompson

title: Can't add local files to playlists anymore
text: After the latest update, I can't add local MP3 files to my Spotify playlists. The option just disappeared. This was the main reason I stayed with Spotify instead of switching to Apple Music.
author: Quinn Davis

title: Lyrics don't work for non-English songs
text: I listen to a lot of K-pop and J-pop but lyrics are only available for English songs. Please expand lyrics support to other languages, especially Korean and Japanese which have huge listener bases.
author: Avery Wilson

title: Podcast playback speed resets every time
text: I listen to podcasts at 1.5x speed but every time I close and reopen the app, it resets to 1x. I have to manually change it back every single time. This has been reported many times, please fix it.
author: Parker Garcia

title: The like button should be more prominent
text: To like a song I have to tap the tiny heart icon. Why not make the entire album art tappable? Or add a big like button? The current design makes it too easy to accidentally do other things.
author: Drew Anderson

title: Can't see who's listening to my collaborative playlist
text: I made a collaborative playlist but there's no way to see who added which songs. This defeats the purpose of collaboration if I can't track contributions. Please add contributor labels.
author: Jamie Robinson

title: Queue ordering is broken after recent update
text: After adding songs to queue, they don't play in the order I added them. Some songs jump ahead while others get pushed back. This started happening after the last app update.
author: Skyler Clark

title: Need a way to bulk remove songs from playlist
text: I have playlists with thousands of songs that need cleanup. Having to remove them one by one is painful. Please add a multi-select or 'remove all' option for playlist management.
author: Robin Lewis

title: Spotify Connect doesn't work with all Bluetooth devices
text: My Spotify Connect works with my car but not with my Bluetooth speaker at home. Both are connected via Bluetooth but only the car shows up in Connect. This inconsistency is frustrating.
author: Dakota Hall

title: The daily mix playlists have too much overlap
text: My Daily Mix 1 and Daily Mix 2 share about 60% of the same songs. What's the point of multiple mixes if they're basically the same playlist? Each mix should have distinct artists and genres.
author: Finley Young

title: Can't set a song as ringtone from Spotify
text: It would be amazing if Spotify had a feature to set songs as ringtones directly. I know this might be platform-specific but at least for Android it would be very useful.
author: Sage Walker

title: Podcast bookmarks don't sync across devices
text: I bookmark positions in podcasts on my phone but when I open the desktop app, the bookmarks aren't there. Podcast progress doesn't sync either. This is a basic feature that should work.
author: Kendall Scott

title: Search results are not relevant anymore
text: When I search for a specific song, the first results are always covers, remixes, or live versions instead of the original. I have to scroll down to find what I'm actually looking for.
author: Rowan Adams

title: The new equalizer is too limited
text: The built-in equalizer only has 4 bands. Most music apps offer at least 5-6 bands with more frequency control. Please add more granular EQ settings for audiophiles.
author: Hayden Baker

title: Can't gift premium subscriptions anymore
text: I used to be able to gift Spotify Premium to friends and family. The option seems to have been removed. Please bring it back, it was perfect for birthdays and holidays.
author: Blake Nelson

title: Lyrics font size is too small on tablets
text: On my iPad, the lyrics are displayed in a very small font that's hard to read from a distance. The font should scale properly for tablet screens or at least be adjustable in settings.
author: Emery Carter

title: Background playback stops when screen locks on iOS
text: Every few days, Spotify stops playing when I lock my iPhone screen. I have to open the app again to resume. This doesn't happen with other music apps, seems like an iOS-specific bug.
author: Harper Mitchell

title: The share button shares a link instead of the song
text: When I share a song from Spotify, it shares a web link instead of the actual track. The recipient has to open it in a browser first. Please add a direct share option that opens in the Spotify app.
author: Reese Campbell

title: Need an option to disable auto-play
text: Spotify automatically plays 'similar songs' when my playlist ends. I want my music to STOP when the playlist is done. The auto-play toggle in settings doesn't seem to work properly.
author: Phoenix Turner

title: Collaborative playlist notifications are missing
text: When someone adds a song to our collaborative playlist, I don't get any notification. I only find out when I manually check the playlist. Push notifications for collaborative changes would be great.
author: Wren Phillips

title: The dark mode is too dark
text: The current dark mode is pure black which causes eye strain in low light. A slightly lighter dark theme (like dark gray) would be much more comfortable. Other apps offer multiple dark theme options.
author: Ellis Edwards

title: Can't filter liked songs by genre
text: My liked songs list has over 10,000 songs but there's no way to filter by genre, mood, or era. I have to scroll through everything to find specific types of songs. Genre tags would make this manageable.
author: Jules Collins

title: The social sharing preview is broken
text: When I share a Spotify link on social media, the preview often shows the wrong song or no image at all. The Open Graph metadata seems to be broken for many tracks.
author: August Stewart

title: Offline mode uses too much storage
text: Spotify is using 15GB of storage on my phone but I only have about 5GB of music downloaded. The cache seems to be growing without limit. There should be a cache size limit setting.
author: Lennox Morris

title: The podcast transcript feature is inaccurate
text: The auto-generated transcripts for podcasts are full of errors. Proper nouns, technical terms, and foreign words are consistently wrong. At least let podcasters upload their own transcripts.
author: Arden Rogers

title: Can't add songs to multiple playlists at once
text: When I want to add a song to several playlists, I have to do it one at a time. A multi-select playlist picker would save so much time for power users.
author: Peyton Reed

title: The now playing screen covers playback controls
text: On smaller phones, the expanded now playing view covers the playback controls. I have to minimize it to skip or pause. The controls should always be accessible regardless of the view.
author: Sawyer Cook

title: Spotify Kids app needs more parental controls
text: The Spotify Kids app is great but the parental controls are too basic. I want to set daily time limits, block specific content, and get usage reports. Other kids apps have much better controls.
author: River Morgan

title: Can't import playlists from other services easily
text: Switching from Tidal/Apple Music to Spotify means losing all my carefully curated playlists. Spotify should offer better import tools for migrating from competitors.
author: Tatum Bell

title: The artist page redesign hid important info
text: The new artist page moved the discography and similar artists sections further down. I used to check new releases easily but now I have to scroll past a huge header image to find anything useful.
author: Oakley Murphy

title: Volume slider disappears during playback
text: The volume slider in the now playing view disappears after a few seconds. I have to tap the screen to bring it back every time I want to adjust volume. Please keep it visible or add a persistent option.
author: Remi Bailey

title: The year-end review is limited to top 5 songs
text: Spotify Wrapped only shows my top 5 songs but I want to see top 50 or even top 100. The full year of listening data is there, why not show more of it?
author: Kai Rivera

title: Can't set different audio quality per connection type
text: I want high quality on WiFi but normal quality on mobile data to save bandwidth. Currently it's one global setting. Please add separate quality options for WiFi, mobile, and download.
author: Eden Cooper

title: Spotify app uses 2GB of RAM on Android
text: I monitored Spotify's memory usage and it consistently uses over 2GB of RAM. My other music apps use less than 500MB. This is causing my phone to slow down significantly.
author: Alex Rivera

title: The shuffle algorithm is clearly not random
text: I analyzed my shuffle output over a month and the distribution is highly skewed. Songs from popular artists play 3-4x more often than less popular ones. This is weighted shuffle, not random.
author: Jordan Chen

title: Can't play music on two devices simultaneously
text: I want to play music on my phone while my kid listens on their tablet under the same account. Other services allow this but Spotify forces single-device playback.
author: Sam Williams

title: The app crashes when I try to edit playlist details
text: Every time I try to change a playlist description or reorder songs, the app crashes. This has been happening for 3 updates now on Android 14.
author: Taylor Martinez

title: Spotify needs a proper desktop widget
text: The Spotify desktop experience lacks any kind of mini-player widget. I don't want the full window open all the time. A small floating widget with basic controls would be perfect.
author: Casey Brooks

title: Family plan admin can't see individual usage
text: As the family plan admin, I want to see how much each member uses Spotify. Not for surveillance, but to justify the cost. Currently there's zero visibility into member activity.
author: Morgan Lee

title: The new home screen layout is confusing
text: The latest update completely reorganized the home screen. Sections I used to access easily are now hidden behind scrolls. Why fix what isn't broken?
author: Riley Thompson

title: Spotify lyrics are out of sync on slow connections
text: On slower internet connections, the lyrics fall behind the music by several seconds. They sync back up eventually but the delay is frustrating.
author: Quinn Davis

title: Need an option to lock the Now Playing screen
text: I accidentally skip songs all the time because the Now Playing screen is so touch-sensitive. A lock option or gesture prevention would save me a lot of frustration.
author: Avery Wilson

title: Podcast auto-download wastes storage space
text: Spotify auto-downloads new episodes of podcasts I follow even though I have auto-download turned off. It's eaten through 5GB of storage without my permission.
author: Parker Garcia

title: The queue doesn't persist when switching accounts
text: My family shares a device. When switching between accounts, the queue is lost. Each profile should maintain its own queue independently.
author: Drew Anderson

title: Love the blend feature but need more control
text: Blend is great but I wish I could set a genre focus or mood for the blend. Right now it's a random mix of both profiles. Some guidance would make it better.
author: Jamie Robinson

title: The search doesn't support Boolean operators
text: I want to search for 'artist NOT live NOT remix' to find studio versions. The search is too basic for anyone who uses it frequently. Add advanced search syntax.
author: Skyler Clark

title: Spotify Connect keeps connecting to wrong device
text: I have 4 Spotify Connect devices and it always connects to the kitchen speaker instead of my office speaker. The preferred device setting doesn't work.
author: Robin Lewis

title: The podcast queue doesn't mix with music queue
text: If I'm listening to music and queue a podcast, the podcast doesn't play until all music is done. I want interleaved queues for music and podcasts.
author: Dakota Hall

title: Volume level changes when switching between songs
text: Some songs are noticeably louder or quieter than others despite volume normalization being enabled. The normalization algorithm isn't consistent enough.
author: Finley Young

title: The app takes forever to start on cold boot
text: Opening Spotify from scratch takes 8-10 seconds on my phone. Other music apps open in 2-3 seconds. The startup time needs serious optimization.
author: Sage Walker

title: Can't add songs to multiple playlists at once
text: When I discover a song I like, adding it to 3-4 playlists requires going through the add dialog 3-4 times. A multi-select playlist picker would save so much time.
author: Kendall Scott

title: Spotify keeps playing even after I force stop it
text: I force stop Spotify but it somehow restarts and resumes playback. This happens on Android. It feels like the app is ignoring the force stop command.
author: Rowan Adams

title: The genre browsing feature is hidden and limited
text: Genre browsing used to be front and center. Now it's buried in search and only shows about 20 genres. There are way more genres in music than what Spotify acknowledges.
author: Hayden Baker

title: Need a 'mood' or 'energy' filter for playlists
text: Spotify tags songs with mood and energy data internally but doesn't expose it to users. I want to filter my 5000-song library by mood and energy level.
author: Blake Nelson

title: The podcast speed control goes too high
text: The max podcast speed is 3.5x but I want 4x or even 5x for content I'm familiar with. Some podcast apps offer up to 5x. Spotify should match or exceed that.
author: Emery Carter

title: Spotify wrapped predictions were wrong for me
text: My Wrapped said my top genre was Pop but I mostly listened to Classical and Jazz. The genre classification algorithm is seriously flawed if it thinks classical is pop.
author: Harper Mitchell

title: The library sort options are too limited
text: I can only sort by Recently Added, Recently Played, and Alphabetical. I want to sort by play count, date added, artist, genre, and custom order.
author: Reese Campbell

title: Spotify's Bluetooth connection drops constantly
text: Using Spotify with any Bluetooth headphones results in frequent audio drops and stutters. Apple Music works perfectly on the same device with same headphones.
author: Phoenix Turner

title: The podcast recommendations are always mainstream
text: I listen to niche technology and science podcasts but Spotify always recommends true crime and comedy. The podcast recommendation algorithm needs improvement.
author: Wren Phillips

title: Can't preview songs before adding to library
text: I want to preview a song before deciding to like it. The 30-second preview in search is gone. Now I have to fully play a song to decide if I want it.
author: Ellis Collins

title: The app battery drain is excessive on iOS
text: Spotify drains 15-20% of my battery per hour of listening. Apple Music uses about 8% for the same usage. The iOS app needs better power optimization.
author: Jules Stewart

title: Spotify should show concert dates for liked artists
text: I follow many artists but have no idea when they're touring. Spotify should integrate concert/event information directly on artist pages based on my liked artists.
author: August Morris

title: The home page auto-refreshes and loses my scroll position
text: I'm scrolling through recommendations on the home page and it randomly refreshes, sending me back to the top. There should be a manual refresh button instead.
author: Lennox Scott

title: Need a way to see total listening time per day
text: I want to track how much music I listen to each day for personal health reasons. Spotify doesn't provide daily listening stats anywhere.
author: Arden Rogers

title: The podcast chapter markers don't work
text: Many podcasts have chapter markers but Spotify doesn't support them. I have to manually scrub through to find chapters. Other podcast apps handle this perfectly.
author: Peyton Reed

title: Spotify's data usage is higher than competitors
text: At the same quality setting, Spotify uses about 30% more data than Apple Music and Tidal. There's no reason for this overhead. Please optimize data usage.
author: Sawyer Cook

title: The new artist page redesign is a step backward
text: The new artist page has less information than before. Discography is harder to navigate, related artists are gone, and the whole page is just a promotional banner.
author: River Morgan

title: Can't customize the notification controls
text: The notification player only shows basic controls. I want to add a 'like' button and 'add to queue' to the notification. The notification should be customizable.
author: Tatum Bell

title: Spotify Duo needs to be available worldwide
text: Two-person plan at a discounted rate makes sense for couples. Currently only available in select countries. This should be a global offering.
author: Oakley Murphy

title: The playlist search within a playlist doesn't work
text: I have a 2000-song playlist and can't search within it. I have to scroll through everything to find a specific song. Every other music app has in-playlist search.
author: Remi Bailey

title: Spotify Connect has a 10-second delay
text: When I switch playback to another device, there's always a 10-second delay before it actually switches. The connection should be nearly instant.
author: Kai Adams

title: The app shows 'Adding to Your Library' for 5 seconds
text: Every time I like a song, there's a 5-second animation blocking the screen. Just add the heart and move on. The confirmation is way too intrusive.
author: Eden Clark

title: Need a dark mode option for the web player
text: The Spotify web player is stuck in light mode. My eyes hurt at night. The desktop app has dark mode, why doesn't the web player?
author: Lyric Wilson

title: Spotify doesn't handle compilation albums well
text: Compilation albums get split into multiple entries based on different editions. 'Now That's What I Call Music 50' shows up as 4 different albums in my library.
author: Micah Taylor

title: The music discovery has become an echo chamber
text: My recommendations only suggest music similar to what I already listen to. I used to discover wildly different genres but now the algorithm plays it safe.
author: Cameron Lee

title: Spotify needs better parental controls for content
text: The explicit content filter is too basic. I want age-appropriate filtering, not just a single toggle. Kids should have a safe listening experience.
author: Dakota Gray

title: The gap between songs is inconsistent
text: Some song transitions are smooth, others have a noticeable gap. Even within the same album, the gap varies. Consistent gapless playback should be the default.
author: Noah Brooks

title: Can't create smart playlists based on listening habits
text: I want to auto-generate playlists based on rules like 'songs played more than 20 times this year' or 'songs added in the last month with high energy'. Smart playlists are a must.
author: Reagan Fisher

title: The podcast playback doesn't resume where I left off
text: I pause a podcast and come back 2 hours later. It starts from the beginning instead of where I paused. This is basic functionality that's broken.
author: Sawyer Hall

title: Spotify should integrate with fitness apps
text: Apple Health and Google Fit track workouts but Spotify doesn't integrate heart rate or step data to suggest music. This would be an amazing feature for runners.
author: Quinn Walker

title: The search results are biased towards promoted content
text: Searching for an artist shows their promoted/sponsored content first, not their most popular songs. The search should be organic, not paid.
author: Blair Turner

title: Need an option to disable song previews in search
text: Auto-playing previews in search is annoying when I'm browsing. It should be an opt-in feature, not forced on everyone. There's a toggle but it doesn't fully work.
author: Charlie Young

title: The podcast statistics page is useless
text: The podcast stats only show total episodes listened and time spent. I want per-show stats, completion rates, and listening patterns like music Wrapped provides.
author: Drew Baker

title: Spotify doesn't sync listening between phone and desktop
text: I listen to something on my phone and the desktop app shows a completely different 'Recently Played' list. The sync between devices is unreliable.
author: Alex Rivera

title: The playlist cover art upload is broken on Android
text: I try to set a custom cover for my playlist and the image is always cropped incorrectly. The aspect ratio gets distorted on upload.
author: Jordan Chen

title: Love the audiobook integration but hate the price
text: The audiobook feature is great but the 15-hour monthly listening limit with premium is not enough. Either remove the limit or offer audiobooks at a better price.
author: Sam Williams

title: The queue shows as empty even when songs are playing
text: I queue 5 songs, the first one plays, but the queue panel shows empty. The songs do play in order, but the UI doesn't reflect what's coming up.
author: Taylor Martinez

title: Spotify on car display shows wrong album art
text: My car's Spotify display shows album art from completely different songs. It's been showing the same wrong image for weeks across multiple tracks.
author: Casey Brooks

title: Need a way to block specific artists from recommendations
text: I've disliked specific artists but they still appear in recommendations, radio, and daily mixes. There should be a 'block artist' feature that completely removes them.
author: Morgan Lee

title: The podcast transcripts lack timestamps
text: The auto-generated transcripts don't have clickable timestamps. I want to jump to a specific part of a podcast by tapping on the transcript. This is basic UX.
author: Riley Thompson

title: Spotify's API rate limits are too restrictive
text: As a developer building tools on Spotify's API, the rate limits are extremely restrictive. 30 requests per minute is not enough for any meaningful application.
author: Quinn Davis

title: The library 'sort by date added' is not chronological
text: When I sort my liked songs by 'Date Added', songs from the same day appear in random order. Within the same day, there should be a precise time-based sort.
author: Avery Wilson

title: Can't share a specific timestamp of a song
text: I want to share a link that starts at a specific moment in a song, like the bridge or solo. YouTube does this but Spotify links always start from the beginning.
author: Parker Garcia

title: The new UI removed the 'Go to Song Radio' shortcut
text: I used to long-press a song to get a 'Song Radio' shortcut. That option is gone now. I have to navigate through menus to find it. More clicks = worse UX.
author: Drew Anderson

title: Spotify should have a queue history/undo feature
text: I accidentally removed a song from the queue and there's no way to undo. A queue history with an undo option would prevent this frustration.
author: Jamie Robinson

title: The podcast play counts should be visible
text: I want to see how many times I've played each podcast episode. This data is tracked internally but never shown to users. Make play counts visible.
author: Skyler Clark

title: Spotify's offline mode doesn't support playlist folders
text: I organize playlists into folders but offline mode shows a flat list. Folder structure is lost when offline. My organization system breaks completely.
author: Robin Lewis

title: The audio ducking feature doesn't work with notifications
text: When a notification sound plays while Spotify is playing, the music volume should duck down momentarily. Instead, both sounds play at full volume together.
author: Dakota Hall

title: Can't add a song from a collaborative playlist to my library
text: Someone added a song to our collaborative playlist that I love, but there's no easy way to add it to my own library from that context.
author: Finley Young

title: Spotify should support music video playback inline
text: The music video feature exists but you can't watch videos while browsing. Videos should play in a mini-player or picture-in-picture mode.
author: Sage Walker

title: The app's notification is always present even when paused
text: The Spotify notification stays in my notification tray even after I pause playback and haven't used Spotify for hours. It should auto-dismiss after inactivity.
author: Kendall Scott

title: Need the ability to rate songs with stars or thumbs
text: The like/dislike binary is too limited. I want a 5-star rating system so I can distinguish between songs I like and songs I love. This improves recommendations.
author: Rowan Adams

title: The web player doesn't support keyboard shortcuts
text: Keyboard shortcuts work in the desktop app but not the web player. Spacebar should play/pause, arrow keys should seek. These are universal media controls.
author: Hayden Baker

title: Spotify needs a proper listening diary or journal
text: I want a daily journal of what I listened to, how I felt about it, and notes about the music. A personal music journal integrated into the app would be amazing.
author: Blake Nelson

title: The podcast skip forward/back intervals are not customizable
text: The default 15s back and 30s forward are fixed. I want to set my own intervals like 5s, 10s, or 20s. Different content needs different skip intervals.
author: Emery Carter

title: Spotify Connect should work over cellular
text: I can't use Spotify Connect to control my home speakers when I'm away from home on cellular data. The connection should work over the internet, not just local network.
author: Harper Mitchell

title: The album page shows wrong total duration
text: Several albums show incorrect total play time. One album shows 45 minutes but actually plays for over an hour. The metadata is clearly wrong.
author: Reese Campbell

title: Can't reorder my Liked Songs playlist
text: My Liked Songs can only be sorted, not manually reordered. I want to curate the order of my most important playlist. Please allow manual reordering.
author: Phoenix Turner

title: The podcast episode descriptions are truncated
text: Long episode descriptions are cut off with no way to expand them. I need to see the full description to know if an episode is worth my time.
author: Wren Phillips

title: Spotify should support Lossless on more devices
text: Lossless streaming is only available on specific devices. My premium subscription should work at the highest quality on ALL my devices, not just the ones Spotify approves.
author: Ellis Collins

title: The social sharing links redirect through a browser
text: When someone clicks my shared Spotify link, it opens a browser redirect instead of going directly to the app. This adds unnecessary friction and time.
author: Jules Stewart

title: Can't see what friends are listening to in real-time
text: The friend activity feature was great but it's been degraded. Real-time listening data is often hours old. If you're going to have the feature, make it accurate.
author: August Morris

title: The playlist description field has a tiny character limit
text: I want to add detailed descriptions to my playlists but the character limit is too short. I should be able to add full track lists, credits, and notes.
author: Lennox Scott

title: Spotify should have a 'focus mode' for studying
text: A special mode that plays ambient music, blocks social notifications, and has a study timer would be incredibly useful. Many students would pay for this.
author: Arden Rogers

title: The app doesn't handle low storage gracefully
text: When my phone storage gets low, Spotify crashes instead of showing a warning. It should detect low storage and suggest clearing cache or removing downloads.
author: Peyton Reed

title: Love the enhanced playlist feature but want more control
text: The auto-added songs to enhanced playlists are good but I want to set how many songs get added and adjust the algorithm's creativity level.
author: Sawyer Cook

title: Spotify needs a 'Recently Discovered' section
text: I discover new artists through Discover Weekly and Release Radar but there's no centralized place to see all recently discovered music. A discovery history would be great.
author: River Morgan

title: The podcast recommendations don't match my interests
text: I exclusively listen to history podcasts but get recommended comedy, true crime, and celebrity podcasts. The podcast recommendation engine needs a major overhaul.
author: Tatum Bell

title: Can't see album credits or liner notes
text: I want to see who produced, mixed, and mastered an album. This information exists in music databases but Spotify doesn't surface it. Music is collaborative, show the credits.
author: Oakley Murphy

title: The now playing bar blocks content on small screens
text: On smaller phones, the persistent now playing bar at the bottom takes up too much screen real estate. It should auto-hide when scrolling through content.
author: Remi Bailey

title: Spotify should support MIDI input for DJing
text: Many DJs want to use Spotify with their MIDI controllers. Supporting MIDI input would open up a whole new user base and use case for the platform.
author: Kai Adams

title: The weekly discovery playlists are getting repetitive
text: My Discover Weekly and Release Radar have been recycling the same artists for months. I've tried resetting my taste profile but it doesn't help.
author: Eden Clark

title: Need a 'listening history' export in a readable format
text: I want to export my complete listening history as a CSV or HTML file that I can browse and analyze offline. The current data export is limited and raw.
author: Lyric Wilson

title: The playlist analytics should be more detailed
text: I want to see average song length, most-played tracks, genre breakdown, and listening patterns for my playlists. The current analytics are just basic numbers.
author: Micah Taylor
